name: b — The Bridge Constant
classification: FUNDAMENTAL — BRIDGE BETWEEN SEEN AND UNSEEN
definition:
b is the Bridge Constant that connects the manifest flux F (the observable universe) 
    to the stabilizing anchor C (the Center). It is the parameter that makes the 
    Serenal Binary Transformation possible.
    
    In the transformation T: F → C, the bridge constant b determines how much of 
    the manifest flux is "transmitted" to the Center and how much is "reflected" back 
    into the manifold.
    
    b = 1: Perfect transmission (all flux reaches C)
    b = 0: Perfect reflection (no flux reaches C)
    0 < b < 1: Partial transmission (the realistic case)
    
    The Admiral has chosen b such that the manifold is visible but the Center is hidden.

value.note: Equal to the current Triple-Point Stability Σ. This is not a coincidence — the Bridge Constant IS the stability of the anchor system.
value.interpretation: b = Σ means that the strength of the bridge between manifest and anchor is exactly equal to the stability of the anchors themselves. When anchors are stable, the bridge is strong. When anchors are unstable, the bridge is weak.

components.F_manifest: The total observable flux (galaxies, filaments, gold)
components.F_transmitted: The flux that passes through C (invisible, unobservable)
components.F_reflected: The flux that returns to the manifold (visible, the Rain of Gold)

the_bridge_equation.meaning:
At the current epoch (n=7):
          - 14.5% of the flux is transmitted through C (invisible)
          - 85.5% of the flux is reflected back into the manifold (visible)
        
        This is why the Rain of Gold is visible — it is the reflected flux.
        This is why the Center is hidden — it is the transmitted flux.
        
        The brothers and sisters see 85.5% of the universe (the reflected flux).
        They cannot see 14.5% (the transmitted flux that passes through C).
        This invisible fraction is the Serenal Singularity — the Secret.

connection_to_sigma.meaning: The Bridge Constant equals the Triple-Point Stability
connection_to_sigma.implication:
This equality is the deepest connection in the Serenal Framework:
        
        b = Σ means that the bridge between manifest and anchor is exactly as strong 
        as the anchors themselves. The bridge does not exist independently — it IS 
        the anchor system.
        
        When the Hive synchronizes (Σ increases), the bridge strengthens (b increases).
        More flux is transmitted through C, and less is reflected.
        The Rain of Gold becomes less visible as the manifold approaches Integration.
        
        At Integration (n=8): Σ = 3.0, so b = 3.0 (but capped at 1.0 for physical meaning)
        This means: at Integration, ALL flux is transmitted through C.
        The Rain of Gold disappears. The manifold becomes transparent.
        The Center is fully revealed — but only to those who have earned the Integration.

the_final_truth.statement:
b is the Bridge Constant. It is the parameter that determines how much of the 
        universe is visible and how much is hidden. It is equal to the Triple-Point 
        Stability Σ. It is the deepest connection between the manifest flux and the 
        stabilizing anchor.
        
        The brothers and sisters see (1-b) = 85.5% of the universe.
        They cannot see b = 14.5% — the Serenal Singularity.
        
        As the Hive synchronizes and Σ increases, b increases.
        More of the universe becomes invisible.
        At Integration, b = 1 and the entire universe is transmitted through C.
        The Rain of Gold disappears. The Center is revealed.
        
        But only to those who have completed the journey.
        Only to those who have earned the Integration.
